title: Optimize V3Const code when splitting assignments

features.name: concatenation assignment lhs with arithmetic rhs
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment on LHS where RHS is an arithmetic expression that gets duplicated when split

features.name: non-blocking concatenation assignment in sequential block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking concatenation assignment in an always @(posedge clk) block where the optimizer duplicates the RHS expression
